disclaimer: Personal signal tracker. Region counts auto-synced from cases-individual.json each ingest; notes on regions are preserved from the ledger template.

regions.name: Ushuaia, Argentina
regions.notes: Ship departure April 1. Index case likely exposed here during birdwatching. 101 hantavirus cases in Argentina since June 2025.

regions.name: Saint Helena
regions.notes: Case 1 died April 11. ~40 passengers disembarked April 24, all contact traced.

regions.name: Ascension Island
regions.notes: Case 3 (British) evacuated April 27, flown to Johannesburg ICU. WHO confirmed.

regions.name: Cape Verde (MV Hondius)
regions.notes: Ship anchored off Praia May 3-7. German woman died May 2. Now heading to Tenerife.

regions.name: Johannesburg, South Africa
regions.notes: Case 2 died April 26 PCR confirmed. Case 3 in ICU improving.

regions.name: Netherlands
regions.notes: Cases 5+6 airlifted May 5, WHO confirmed. KLM flight attendant tested NEGATIVE May 9 - cleared.

regions.name: Zurich, Switzerland
regions.notes: Case 7. Male passenger confirmed Andes strain at University Hospital Zurich.

regions.name: France
regions.notes: RUMOR PING: Contact monitoring. Shared Airlink flight with case 2.

regions.name: Singapore
regions.notes: RUMOR PING: 2 residents (67, 65) isolated in govt facility. Tests pending.

regions.name: Arizona, USA
regions.notes: RUMOR PING: 1 returning passenger monitoring. Currently healthy.

regions.name: Georgia, USA
regions.notes: RUMOR PING: 2 residents monitoring. Both healthy, no infection signs.

regions.name: California, USA
regions.notes: RUMOR PING: California DPH monitoring returning travelers. No illness.

regions.name: Omaha, Nebraska USA
regions.notes: CDC biocontainment unit activated at Nebraska Medicine. 17 Americans being chartered from MV Hondius for quarantine here.

regions.name: Tenerife, Spain
regions.notes: Ship arriving Granadilla port May 9. Spain approved after WHO pressure. 146 passengers from 23 nationalities to disembark.

regions.name: United Kingdom
regions.notes: WHO notified by UK IHR focal point May 2. Contact tracing for ~40 Saint Helena disembarkees underway.

regions.name: Tristan da Cunha
regions.notes: RUMOR PING: British health authorities monitoring resident of isolated settlement following MV Hondius visit. Potential island spill.

regions.name: Canada
regions.notes: RUMOR PING: PHAC monitoring returning MV Hondius travelers. No illness reported.

regions.name: Uruguay
regions.notes: RUMOR PING: Index case crossed into Uruguay March 13, returned March 27. Route under investigation.

regions.name: Chile
regions.notes: RUMOR PING: Index case crossed Chile border multiple times. Neuquen and Misiones WHO-endemic zones visited.
